← Work

Garden House

Villas · Jeddah · 2023 Concept study

Rather than consuming its plot, the house withdraws to the edge and gives the garden the leading role. The dark facade frames the green, and daily life extends outside beneath deep shade.

Location
Jeddah
Year
2023
Category
Villas
Status
Concept study
Services
Architectural concept · Interior direction · Landscape direction

The house lines the plot's northern edge as a long, dark volume, freeing the entire southern side for garden and sun. Living and kitchen open onto it through a glazed face sheltered by a deep canopy.

Inside, the palette reverses: pale timber, warm plaster, and light that changes with the leaves. A house meant to grow with its family — and with its garden.

The images above are atmosphere and material references by Unsplash photographers, part of a temporary sample presentation. Image credits.
